alkylation reagent: iodoacetamide was added to alkylate proteins
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin and subjected to MS/MS analysis
instrument: analyzed by Q Exactive hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled online to UPLC and nanospray ionization
reduction reagent: 0.1 M DTT were added into the tube
reduction concentration: 0.1 M DTT were added into the tube
